subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Clear progression from introduction through methodology to conclusion
Detailed table of contents and logical headings for easy navigation
Relevant aim section precisely defining variables and scope
weaknesses: Repetition of material (textbook definitions and sampleâsize justification) affects conciseness
Inconsistent formatting in tables (missing unit labels, broken appendix layout)
Bibliography and figure captions lack consistent formatting
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Two strands (coherence and organization) reach band 3 with minor lapses; conciseness is at band 2 due to repetition. Overall the exploration is coherent and well structured but not yet exceptionally concise or polished, meriting a 3/4.

strengths: Mostly consistent and correct use of mathematical notation (e.g. \bar{x}, r, regression formulae)
Effective use of multiple representations: rawâdata table, scatter plot with regression line, calculation tables
Clear logical structure: each step is introduced, derived and applied with understandable explanations
weaknesses: Occasional typographical slips in notation (\overline{v} vs \bar{y}, missing bars in squared terms)
Hypotheses lack explicit formal notation for dependence vs independence
Absence of additional representations (e.g. residual plot) limits deeper interpretation
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All strands are assessed at band 3: notation and representation are mostly consistent, and communication is clear. Minor inconsistencies prevent a perfect 4, so a 3/4 is appropriate.

strengths: Investigation of an original 172-country dataset shows meaningful self-direction
Introduction and conclusion reflect personal interest in medicine and statistics
Manual demonstration of sample calculations displays initiative
weaknesses: Methodology follows standard syllabus procedures without novel extensions
Some personalâinterest examples dilute focus rather than strengthen it
No innovative use of alternative models or self-developed code
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work demonstrates significant independent thinking and a clear personal voice but lacks the innovation or creativity for the highest band, justifying a 2/3.

strengths: Conclusion and limitations section provide meaningful reflection on sampling and causation
Student acknowledges measurement error and the nonâcausal nature of correlation
Outcomes are evaluated via rÂ² interpretation with suggestions for additional variables
weaknesses: Reflection remains fairly descriptive and brief rather than deeply critical
Underlying statistical assumptions (linearity, homoscedasticity) are not probed
Recommendations for future work lack analytical detail
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Reflection and analysis are present and thoughtful (band 2) but not substantial or critical enough for band 3. A score of 2/3 accurately reflects this level.

strengths: Relevant mathematics (correlation, regression, Pearsonâs r, rÂ²) is used appropriately
Techniques are fully commensurate with SL syllabus level
Calculations are largely accurate and well explained, demonstrating good understanding
weaknesses: Dependence on software without manual demonstration for key calculations
Minor typographical slips and omission of intermediate values (S_xy, S_xx)
Limited sampling for worked examples (only three countries) reduces depth
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Relevance and level are at band 4, but understanding and accuracy exhibit minor errors and reliance on software (band 3). The overall performance lies between these, warranting a 3/6 to balance strengths and weaknesses.

strandSelections.reasoning: Each mathematical step is introduced, derived, then applied, giving the work a clear logical thread. Explanations are generally understandable even to a non-specialist reader. Minor inconsistencies (e.g. line breaks inside formulas) prevent a perfect score, but structure and clarity are good.

Calculations of means, slope, intercept, \(r\) and \(r^2\) are largely accurate; the student explains each step, showing good conceptual grasp. Minor typographical slips and dependence on Logger Pro for most computations mean accuracy is âmostly correctâ rather than completely error-free, aligning with the 4-mark band.

The student provides a large raw-data table, a scatter plot with regression line, and sample calculation tables. These representations are appropriate and help readers visualise the relationship. More varied graphics (e.g. residual plot) would be needed for the highest band, but overall use is effective.

The exploration follows a clear progression from introduction, methodology, analysis, to conclusion. Arguments are generally easy to follow and each statistical test is introduced and then applied. Minor lapses (e.g. repeated explanations of correlation and a few digressions) prevent it from reaching the âexcellent logical developmentâ standard but overall coherence is consistently maintained.

Collecting a full WHO data set and manually demonstrating sample calculations display initiative, but creativity is moderate; no novel statistical techniques or creative data treatments are attempted. Thus the work fits the âgood level of creativity and initiativeâ descriptor.

The student comments on the impact of measurement error and acknowledges that correlation does not imply causation. This shows thoughtful analysis, yet it stops short of probing the statistical assumptions (e.g. linearity, homoscedasticity) in depth, so insight is moderate.

Outcomes are evaluated by computing \(r^2\) and discussing that only 39 % of variance is explained. Suggestions for including more variables and years are offered, indicating a clear but not comprehensive evaluation with limited forward planning.

Reflection appears in the conclusion and a separate limitations section, where the student recognises sampling-year constraints and measurement issues. These reflections are meaningful but fairly brief and remain descriptive rather than deeply critical.

Symbols such as \(\bar{x}\), \(r\), and regression equations are used correctly and explanations accompany them. There are occasional typographical slips (\(\overline{v}\) instead of \(\bar{y}\)), but notation is mostly consistent and clear across the essay.

The introduction and conclusion link the topic to the studentâs personal interests in medicine and statistics, demonstrating a clear personal voice. Nevertheless, the analytical pathway largely mirrors textbook methodology, limiting the uniqueness of approach.

Almost all content is relevant to establishing correlation; however, several pages re-state textbook definitions, and the worked example with only three countries is unnecessarily long. These additions lengthen the report without adding insight, so conciseness is moderate rather than strong.

Correlation, linear regression, Pearsonâs r, and \(r^2\) are directly relevant to assessing association between two quantitative variables and are applied appropriately. No extraneous or off-level techniques are included, confirming effective relevance.

Choosing an original data set of 172 countries and carrying out independent calculations shows meaningful self-direction, but the mathematical techniques are standard syllabus procedures. Evidence of deeper innovation (e.g. alternative models or self-programmed code) is absent, so engagement is significant rather than outstanding.

A detailed table of contents, numbered sections, and logical headings (Methodology, Visualisation, r, rÂ², Limitations) show good organisation. Readers can locate material quickly and the argument is built in a structured sequence. The piece does not reach the âexceptionalâ band because some subsections (e.g. duplicated linear-regression formulae) could be merged for smoother flow.

The mathematics is solidly within SL level and fully commensurate: statistical tests, mean, standard deviation, regression. The student applies them correctly and in context, satisfying the descriptor for full commensurateness without extending beyond the syllabus.

annotations.comment: The research question is clearly stated and focuses specifically on the correlation between alcohol consumption and breast cancer incidence, providing a strong framework for the investigation.
Several subsections in the table of contents share the same page number and could be merged for more concise structure.
A stray OCR artifact (â\overline{2}â) appears at the bottom of the page, disrupting the flow. Remove or correct this element.
Consider adding the candidateâs name and submission date near the title to enhance presentation and contextual clarity.
The detailed table of contents with precise page references greatly aids navigation and shows strong organizational planning.
The paragraph discusses disparate examples (e.g., traffic light wait times) which dilute focus; refine to maintain thematic coherence.
A stray formatting element appears at the bottom of the page; ensure that all extraneous tags or math delimiters are removed.
The aim section precisely defines the variables and scope of the investigation, providing clear direction for the methodology.
The concepts section repeats textbook definitions without discussing their limitations or applicability nuances; deepen the conceptual analysis.
The methodology appropriately cites the WHO as the data source, enhancing credibility and demonstrating sound data selection.
The justification of sample size is repeated in consecutive sentences; condense this discussion to improve conciseness.
The hypotheses are stated but lack explicit mathematical notation for independence; express Hâ clearly (e.g., âvariables are dependentâ).
The regression and mean formulae are correctly formatted with LaTeX, showing consistent mathematical notation.
The intercept formula uses â\overline{v}â instead of â\overline{y}â, causing potential confusion. Correct this notation.
Rather than relying solely on software, demonstrate a manual calculation for at least one slope or intercept to reinforce mathematical understanding.
The introduction effectively demonstrates personal engagement by linking the studentâs interests in statistics and medicine to the research focus.
The sample calculation table for Pearsonâs r effectively demonstrates the methodology in a concise format.
Demonstrating only three countries for Pearsonâs r may underrepresent dataset variability; sample additional cases or summarize key statistics.
Clarify the distinction between the datasetâs population mean (4.27) and the sample mean (4.47) to prevent confusion.
Table 1 headers omit unit labels for x and y variables; include units in column headings for full clarity.
The step-by-step summation and square root steps for Pearsonâs r are logically structured and easy to follow.
Bibliography entries lack a consistent formatting style (use of italics, punctuation); standardize using a recognized citation format.
The description of axes and interpretation of the regression line is clear, linking the positive gradient to a practical increase in incidence.
Figure 1 is referred to but lacks a clear caption and in-text label; add a numbered figure caption and reference in the narrative.
Adding a residual plot would provide a valuable additional representation to assess the modelâs assumptions and improve interpretation.
The discussion of standard deviation rounds Â±23 ASR imprecisely; retain the full value (23.56) for accuracy in mathematical communication.
The notation for squared terms sometimes omits bars (e.g. â(y - y)â rather than â(y - \bar{y})â); ensure notation consistency.
The final result r=0.624 is quoted without summarizing intermediate S_xy and S_xx values; include a brief table of these to reinforce accuracy.
To deepen critical reflection, discuss the underlying assumptions (linearity, homoscedasticity) and how they were assessed.
The interpretation of r^2 as explaining ~39% of variance is well phrased, linking statistical results to real-world implications.
The coefficient of determination discussion conflates error variance and explained variance; clarify phrasing to match formal definitions.
The conclusion effectively summarizes findings and notes that correlation does not imply causation, demonstrating critical awareness.
The recommendation to include additional variables is brief; specify which factors and propose how to integrate them analytically (e.g., multivariate regression).
The standalone âLimitationsâ section duplicates content rather than integrating with reflection for coherence; consider merging these discussions.
Quotations (e.g. Mark Twain) disrupt the formal analytical tone and could be omitted to maintain academic focus.
Alphabetize the bibliography and apply consistent style guidelines (e.g., APA) to improve presentation and reliability.
The raw data appendix is comprehensive but overwhelming; consider summarizing key descriptive statistics in the main text and moving the full table to an online repository.
The appendix table lacks clear formatting and breaks header rows; clean up table layout to ensure readability of country names and values.
